1.premise: Barbie's sex appeal is widely understood about the doll but rarely said aloud.
Monistat 3 is like Godfather Part 3 because both are inferior substitutes for Part 1.
Minnesota being icy is widely understood about January but rarely needs saying aloud.
Mario Kart damage could be Mercedes repair pricing.

lines.text: - Yikes, that was kinda gross about that guy.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Mattel Toy Company has just come out
lines.label: setup

lines.text: with an autistic version of Barbie,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and luckily this version still has those great tits.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Okay, this next joke is for the ladies.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: You're like, "Hey, if they don't have Monostat 1, just get Monostat 3."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Uh, yeah, that's like saying, "Hey, if the video store doesn't have Godfather Part 1,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: One of those is a pharmaceutical masterpiece and the other one, uh, it has its flaws.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Okay, all the ladies are laughing at that one out there.

lines.text: This weekend, I got a new Mercedes in Mario Kart!

lines.text: Okay, that's my time. Thank you, Tony.
